allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import mcp; print\('mcp version:', mcp.__version__ if hasattr\(mcp, '__version__'\) else 'installed'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from importlib.metadata import version; print\('mcp:', version\('mcp'\)\); print\('anthropic:', version\('anthropic'\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP; print\('FastMCP OK:', FastMCP\)")
